completed_tasks.name: Phase 1 planning package
completed_tasks.progress: project scaffolding docs, phase context, research, executable plans, and session handoff artifacts created

blockers.description: git is not available on PATH in the current environment, so GSD commit steps cannot run automatically
blockers.workaround: Install git or add it to PATH before expecting automated GSD commit steps

human_actions_pending.action: Ensure git is available on PATH if commit automation is required
human_actions_pending.context: Planning artifacts exist, but commit helpers cannot run without git

decisions.decision: Phase 1 is documentation-first and ADR-first before broad scaffolding
decisions.rationale: Future sessions must be able to continue from repository files alone

decisions.decision: Repository shape should separate runtime apps from shared packages
decisions.rationale: This preserves maintainability and supports a dedicated terminal worker

decisions.decision: Fake adapters and local smoke verification are mandatory foundation outputs
decisions.rationale: Later phases must be testable without the production terminal

next_action: Read .planning/phases/01-foundation-contracts/.continue-here.md, then start Phase 1 execution with 01-01-PLAN.md
context_notes: The repository is organized for session independence. Do not skip ADR-001 or jump straight into feature scaffolding; Phase 1 exists to lock stack, structure, contracts, and verification.
